prompt: Modify the UI in image 1 by incorporating the detailed RPG-style health and skill bar layout from image 2, blending it with the existing FPS interface elements.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Replace the current health display (green bar and '400') in the bottom-left corner with the detailed RPG-style health bar, XP bar, and level indicator (e.g., 'Level 11', '1,147') from the top-left of image 2. Additionally, integrate the complete RPG-style skill bar, including all ability icons and the central red and blue orb, from the bottom-center of image 2 into the bottom-center area of image 1. Position this skill bar above the existing ammo counter ('25/100') while ensuring it blends seamlessly with the surrounding FPS interface elements in image 1.
objects: RPG-style health bar, XP bar, and level indicator in the bottom-left corner
RPG-style skill bar with ability icons and central red and blue orb in the bottom-center
Ammo counter ('25/100') below the skill bar
Beach environment with barbed wire and sandbags
Top-right interface elements (e.g., team scores, map icon)
Right-side interface elements (e.g., grenade, hammer icons)
Green health bar and '400' in the bottom-left corner (should not be present)
